title: IDF Airstrike Kills Senior Gaza Police Official and 8 Others in Zawayda
detail: An IDF airstrike on March 31, 2026 in Zawayda, central Gaza, killed a senior Gaza police official along with eight other people and injured 14. The IDF stated the strike targeted Hamas operatives, including individuals involved in the October 7, 2023 attacks who were described as 'preparing to carry out an attack on Israeli forces.' Palestinian civil defense confirmed the deaths. The strike was condemned by Palestinian officials as a ceasefire violation. The IDF separately announced it eliminated 60 terrorists in Gaza over the preceding month.

title: UN: Israel Approved Nearly 37,000 West Bank Settlement Units in Past 12 Months
detail: A OHCHR report published in late March 2026 documented that Israel had advanced or approved 36,973 West Bank settlement housing units and established 84 new illegal outposts in the preceding 12 months, warning of 'mass forcible transfer' and concerns about ethnic cleansing. East Jerusalem evictions continued: 15 Palestinian households (70 people, including 29 children) were forcibly evicted from Silwan and Batn al-Hawa on March 20, 22, and 25 to allow settler organization Ateret Cohanim to take over the properties. OCHA reported 1,697 Palestinians already displaced in the West Bank during 2026, exceeding all displacements during 2025.
